description: Production-ready OpenAI-compatible API gateway providing unified access to 113+ language models from 17 providers via AWS Bedrock with streaming, tool calling, vision, JSON mode, and 35-50% cost savings through Flex pricing
rules: Use standard OpenAI SDK with base_url pointing to Brainiall gateway
Authentication via Bearer token, api-key header, or Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key
Use streaming for real-time responses with stream=True
Use response_format for JSON mode output
Models support tool calling and structured output
